{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Last Oath Monarch
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Last Oath Monarch]] used [[scripts]] to lock places in time.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
